body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Some changes to how macro internals are handled were made in [ClimaComms v0.6.2](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaComms.jl). One of these changes doesn't allow us to define a variable inside a macro call (e.g. `@time`). This PR updates our usage to reflect that.

title: ClimaComms @time fix
